title: crataegus pruinosa f. angulata
intro: Crataegus pruinosa f. angulata, also known as the hawthorn shrub, is a variant of the Crataegus pruinosa species and a member of the rose family. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins, and other bioactive compounds, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits associated with Crataegus pruinosa f. angulata include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiac function, and reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used to support cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
